name.description: The name of the OauthIdpConfig. Must start with `oidc.`.

issuer.description: For OIDC Idps, the issuer identifier.

client_id.description: The client id of an OAuth client.

enabled.description: If this config allows users to sign in with the provider.

client_secret.description: The client secret of the OAuth client, to enable OIDC code flow.

response_type.description: The response type to request for in the OAuth authorization flow. You can set either idToken or code to true, but not both. Setting both types to be simultaneously true ({code: true, idToken: true}) is not yet supported. Structure is [documented below](#nested_response_type).

id_token.description: If true, ID token is returned from IdP's authorization endpoint.

code.description: If true, authorization code is returned from IdP's authorization endpoint.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
